contracts.name: Skill catalog/resolver contract
contracts.shape: GET/POST server resolver surface that returns shared WorkflowPhaseSkillResolution objects for template authoring, import/export, and runtime.
contracts.consumer: WorkflowTemplateEditor, workflow import preview, workflow export, runtime prompt assembly, status panel.

contracts.name: Workflow export contract
contracts.shape: Existing { schemaVersion, exportedAt, templates } payload plus dependencyManifest; skill package contents are not bundled.

contracts.name: Workflow import preview contract
contracts.shape: Candidates gain dependencyDiagnostics and non-blocking warning issues for missing recommended skills.

contracts.name: Workflow session summary/status contract
contracts.shape: Workflow summary gains compact recommendedSkillStatus/evidence summary, while detailed state/report carries full snapshot/evidence.

validation_rules: invalid-reference is an error only for malformed skill reference shape.
missing/plugin-disabled/unsupported-source recommended skills are warnings and must not block import or completion by default.
ambiguous references require disambiguation before treating the skill as available.
resolved plugin-provided skills remain skill references with plugin provenance.
